notes: BinaryDiscoveryService implemented as actor conforming to existing BinaryLocating protocol. FileExistenceChecking dependency injected for testability. Sanitised PATH walk drops empty, relative, '..' and duplicate entries. Cache invalidated by reDetect(). Logs only sanctioned metadata via Log.discovery (name .public, resolved path .private). 6 unit tests added; full suite green (141 passed).
commits: feat(discovery): add BinaryDiscoveryService with caching and override support
